note: Support coin kit. Skill1: fires every 8 full-charge attacks (SR = 1 hit/pull, so hitCount 8, not the parser's every-shot) -> team burst CDR 7s; its Max-HP grant is skipped (defensive, no restore). Skill2 coin chain: only the Sword Coin Attack Damage 6.65% is offensive -> modeled as a permanent all-ally buff ('self and 2 allies on both sides' in a 5-slot squad = whole team). Shield Coin (Damage Taken down) and Double Sword Coin (Max HP up) are defensive and skipped. Burst slot omitted: the parser already emits the ATK 15.07%-of-caster team buff faithfully; the three coin-gated Max-HP grants are defensive and correctly dropped.
